import re

def text_lowercase_underscore(text):
    # Find all sequences of lowercase letters joined with underscores
    matches = re.findall(r'[a-z]+_+[a-z]+', text)
    if matches:
        return 'Found a match!'
    else:
        return 'Not matched!'
